blocked_reason: RASPA3 v3.0.29 has no native representation for the Dzubak two-attraction form V(r) = A·exp(-B·r) - C/r^5 - D/r^6. Buckingham (C/r^6 only) is the closest available form but cannot recover the C/r^5 mid-range attraction term that Dzubak 2012 specifically introduced for Mg-MOF-74 + CO2.
